user.title: Solar Forecast
user.description: Set up a weather-driven PV production forecast. If you have a production sensor with several months of history, the model will train itself automatically. Otherwise enter your panel specs on the next page.

data.name: Name
data.sensor_kind: Do you have a PV production sensor?
data.daily_energy_entity: Daily production sensor (resets to 0 each midnight)
data.bootstrap_days: Days of history to scan for auto-training

panel.title: Panel specs
panel.description: Without a production sensor, the forecast uses a physics-based model. Enter the total installed kWp, tilt and azimuth of your panels. Default azimuth 180° = south.

abort.already_configured: A Solar Forecast for this location is already configured.

options.none: No sensor — use panel specs only
options.daily: Yes — daily kWh that resets at midnight
